untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put/call ratio calculation from index options (S&P 500, S&P 500 100, Nasdaq-100). This is a proprietary derivatives-based indicator that is not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators cover price action, technicals, and basic volume ratios, but do not include options market data or put/call ratios. Regression analysis on next-day returns also cannot be expressed as simple condition-based rules.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a regression-based predictive model using options market microstructure data, not a rule-based technical system. It requires: (1) real-time options volume data by instrument type, (2) statistical regression modeling, and (3) cross-asset correlation analysis across multiple index options. The backtest engine would need to support options data feeds and statistical model deployment rather than simple conditional logic.
